description: Schema for metadata.yaml — defines ABI naming conventions, primitive types, and API versions.

schema_version.description: IDL schema version that this metadata and its associated modules comply with. MAJOR.MINOR, or legacy MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH (patch ignored).

versions.description: The described API's known versions (vX.Y.Z), newest last or in any order. Validates 'added' / 'deprecated' on functions. The spec itself describes the API as of the latest of these.

suffixes.description: ABI naming suffixes applied to each construct type. Every adapter uses these to compute canonical names.

primitives.description: Primitive type vocabulary with C ABI type names.

prefix.description: String prepended to all generated C identifiers (types, functions, constants). E.g. 'duckdb_v2_' yields 'duckdb_v2_open'; uppercase form used for constants/enum values.

options.description: Adapter-specific rendering options, keyed by adapter name. Each adapter reads its own namespace.

lifecycle_states.description: The lifecycle states constructs can be in, and how each renders. Only declared states exist; a construct's 'lifecycle' entries must name them.

comment_width.description: Column budget deciding a one-line //! comment vs a /*! */ block.

deprecated_macro.description: Attribute macro name used when emit_deprecated_attribute is on.

emit_deprecated_attribute.description: Put the deprecated attribute macro on deprecated function declarations.

typedef_guard_prefix.description: Prefix of the include-guard macros around qualified-alias typedefs.

banner.description: Verbatim banner at the top of the generated header.

handles.description: Handle rendering style. Changing a style is an ABI break.

emit_enum_max_member.description: Append the int-max sentinel to every enum. Default true.

emit_v1_primitive_defs.description: Emit the hand-rolled V1 preamble definitions.

emit_arrow_defs.description: Emit the Arrow C Data Interface struct definitions in the preamble.

export_macro.description: Export/visibility macro on every function declaration.

create_method.description: Name of the engine-side function that fills the struct.

version_macro_prefix.description: Prefix of the engine-side version define macros.

exclude_functions.description: Spec functions kept out of the struct, by bare unprefixed name.

StateDefinition.description: When constructs in this state are emitted. always: unconditionally. opt_in: behind #ifdef guard. opt_out: behind #ifndef guard. never: not emitted at all. The guard is the macro token for the gated modes.

guard.description: Macro token for opt_in / opt_out gating.

name.description: Abstract type name used in the API spec.

c_type.description: Canonical C type name in the ABI.

underlying.description: If present, the generator emits 'typedef <underlying> <c_type>;' in the header preamble before all modules.
